name: Duoflo 智能淋浴花洒套装
description: 采用先进的双流量模式设计，一个花洒两种出水体验，满足不同冲洗需求。节水环保，同时保持卓越的淋浴体验。
descriptionEn: Featuring advanced dual-flow technology, the Duoflo offers two distinct shower experiences in one fixture. Water-efficient yet luxurious.

seo.title: Duoflo 智能淋浴花洒套装 - SEWOO 高端卫浴

name: Zen 头顶花洒
